title: Futuristic dark hero background image with preserved glassmorphism and legible hero text

requirements.summary: Add a new realistic futuristic dark hero background image as a generated static asset.
acceptanceCriteria: A new generated image file exists at frontend/public/assets/generated/hero-futuristic-dark-bg.dim_1920x1080.png
The generated image is visually dark, realistic, and futuristic (not flat/abstract-only), suitable for a full-screen hero background

file_operations.description: Add the generated realistic futuristic dark full-screen hero background image as a static asset at this exact path and filename (1920x1080).

requirements.summary: Render the new hero background image full-screen behind hero content while keeping glass panel and text highly readable, and keeping existing animated overlays subtle.
acceptanceCriteria: Hero background renders the new static image at full-screen size behind the hero content (no tiling, maintains cover behavior, and remains visually crisp)
The glass-panel container remains glassmorphism (blur + translucent) and sits above the background image
Hero headline and subtext have sufficient contrast/legibility against the new background (no parts become hard to read on common desktop/mobile breakpoints)

Existing subtle animated background/parallax effects (AnimatedBackground + radial overlay) do not overpower the new image; they remain subtle or are appropriately blended/toned down so the image still reads as the primary background

file_operations.description: Update the hero section layering so the new futuristic dark image is the base full-screen background (cover/center/no-repeat), add/adjust a subtle dark scrim or gradient overlay as needed for headline/subtext contrast across breakpoints, and reduce/blend the existing AnimatedBackground canvas and radial parallax overlay so they remain subtle and do not overpower the image.

requirements.summary: Centralize the new hero background image URL in the shared assets config and reference it from the hero section.
acceptanceCriteria: frontend/src/config/assets.ts exports a new constant for the generated futuristic dark hero background image URL
Hero section uses the exported constant rather than an inline hardcoded string path

file_operations.description: Add and export a new asset URL constant for the generated hero background image pointing to frontend/public/assets/generated/hero-futuristic-dark-bg.dim_1920x1080.png (using the existing base-path-aware helper).
Import and use the new exported asset constant from frontend/src/config/assets.ts as the background image source instead of any inline string path.
